channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US fugitive arrested in Gqeberha over alleged child sexual assault cases in Texas
item.description: Police in Gqeberha have arrested a 56-year-old American citizen, Robert Lee Redd Jr, who is wanted in the United States in connection with serious sexual assault allegations involving two minors in Te...

item.title: Vertu launches $6,880 AI-powered foldable smartphone targeting enterprise executives
item.description: Luxury smartphone maker Vertu has unveiled a new foldable device designed specifically for business executives who manage operations on the move. The device, called Alphafold, starts at $6,880 for its...

item.title: Environmental concerns over major infrastructure projects in the Philippines, from Boracay bridge to Quirino Avenue tree cutting
item.description: This opinion article discusses growing concerns over how infrastructure development in the Philippines is being carried out at the expense of environmental protection. It highlights two major examples...

item.title: Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz underwent surgery at Lahore hospital, confirms minister
item.description: Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz has undergone a major surgical procedure at Sharif Medical City Hospital in Lahore, according to senior provincial minister Marriyum Aurangzeb. In a statement shared...

item.title: Haifa Port Emerges as a Strategic Trade and Connectivity Hub for India in West Asia
item.description: The article explains the growing importance of Israel’s Haifa Port in India’s economic and strategic planning in West Asia. Located on Israel’s northern coast, Haifa Port is one of the country’s bigge...

item.title: Legal experts say Ramaphosa’s Phala Phala review application has merit amid impeachment scrutiny
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa’s legal challenge to the independent panel report on the Phala Phala matter has been assessed by legal analysts, who say the application appears to have merit. The review app...

item.title: Tanzania Hosts Impact Investment Forum Showcasing Startups and Growth Opportunities
item.description: The Tanzania Impact Investment Forum (TIIF) 2026 is set for 1st–3rd June at Johari Rotana Hotel in Dar es Salaam, bringing together investors, high-impact SMEs, policymakers, and development partners ...

item.title: Nigerian man prefers cash to dinner with Davido, sparking online debate
item.description: A Nigerian man sparked a lively online debate after saying he would take 22 million Kenyan shillings in cash rather than dine with Afrobeats star Davido. He questioned the value of a dinner with the m...

item.title: Harry Kane predicts PSG will have slight edge over Arsenal in Champions League final
item.description: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane don talk say Paris Saint-Germain get small advantage as dem go face Arsenal for the UEFA Champions League final wey go happen for Budapest, Hungary on Saturday. Kane, ...

item.title: Former child influencer Piper Rockelle discusses her transition to OnlyFans and the controversies surrounding youth-focused adult content
item.description: The article examines the career and public image of Piper Rockelle, a former child influencer who became one of the most successful creators on OnlyFans shortly after turning 18. Rockelle, who built a...

item.title: Retired federal judges challenge legality of Trump-related DOJ settlement and $1.8 billion fund
item.description: A bipartisan group of 35 retired federal judges has filed a motion in a Florida federal court challenging a controversial settlement involving Donald Trump, his family, and the Department of Justice. ...

item.title: Autopsies Confirm Gunshot Deaths of Three Men During Molo Fuel Protests as Families Raise Police Brutality Claims
item.description: Families in Molo, Nakuru County, are mourning and demanding accountability following the release of autopsy results for three men who died during recent fuel price protests. The post-mortem examinatio...

item.title: AI Phone Monitoring Shows Promise in Reducing Hospitalizations for Heart Failure Patients
item.description: A study led by cardiologist Aleix Olivella at Vall d’Hebron University Hospital explores the use of conversational artificial intelligence to remotely monitor patients with heart failure, a chronic an...

item.title: President Ruto Commits to Peaceful 2027 Elections and Respect for Results
item.description: President William Ruto has assured Kenyans that he will accept the outcome of the 2027 General Election, whether he wins a second term or not, attributing his political future to God’s plan. Speaking ...

item.title: Canadian Chamber of Commerce calls for stronger focus on competitiveness and economic growth ahead of federal budget
item.description: The Canadian Chamber of Commerce is urging the federal government to shift its attention away from ongoing concerns over U.S. trade measures, including tariffs associated with former U.S. president Do...

item.title: Judge allows Florida teen accused in cruise ship killing to remain with family pending detention decision
item.description: A U.S. federal judge has decided not to immediately detain a 16-year-old Florida boy accused of sexually assaulting and killing his 18-year-old stepsister, Anna Kepner, aboard a Carnival cruise ship i...

item.title: Opinion piece criticizes proposed Canadian surveillance powers in Bill C-22
item.description: This opinion article argues that the Canadian Liberal government poses a greater threat to civil liberties than large technology companies because of proposed surveillance legislation contained in Bil...

item.title: Tragic Utumishi Girls Academy dormitory fire leaves deaths as sponsor Ndungu Nyoro confirms safety of two students
item.description: A tragic dormitory fire broke out at Utumishi Girls Academy in Gilgil, Nakuru County, in the early hours of Thursday, May 28 at around 2 am, leaving the school community and the nation in shock. Repor...

item.title: Thomas Msengana appointed as interim host of Kaya 959 weekday breakfast show after Sizwe Dhlomo exit
item.description: Kaya 959 has confirmed that veteran broadcaster Thomas Msengana will take over the station’s weekday breakfast slot during June 2026, following the departure of well-known radio personality Sizwe Dhlo...

item.title: Twelve-year-old cyclist seriously injured in Brisbane collision with car
item.description: A 12-year-old boy is in hospital with serious injuries after a collision between his bicycle and a car in Brisbane’s north during Thursday afternoon rush hour. The crash occurred on Riordan Street in ...
